# Clapperboard

data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Clapperboard;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Clapperboard { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
movie, film, video, camera, cinema, cut, action, television, tv, show, entertainment

multimedia
